popularStory.headline: Alexander Rotherford, by Lyman De Platt
popularStory.description: Alexander Rotherford was born about 1522. He was of Yorkshire, England, probably around Beverly, home of the Leavitt. He was the son of William Lavitt and Joan Ungland; and grandson of Richard Leavitt …

zh.York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭越可爾約克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Rotherforth於1561年出生時，她的父親Alexander Rotherford38歲，母親Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth33歲。她於大約1574年與William Drake在英國越可爾結婚。她去世於1607年在英國越可爾享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾明布盧。

zh-hans.York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰越可爾約克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Rotherforth于1561年出生时，她的父亲Alexander Rotherford38岁，母亲Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth33岁。她于大约1574年与William Drake在英国越可爾结婚。她去世于1607年在英国越可爾享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾明布盧。

nameMeanings.name: Rotherforth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rutherford
meanings: Scottish and northern English: habitational name from Rutherford in Maxton (Roxburghshire), apparently named with Old English hrīther, hrȳther ‘ox’ + ford ‘ford’, though a British Celtic origin of the type ro- ‘great’ + dubr- ‘water, river’ is also possible for the first element. Places named Rutherford in West Linton (West Lothian) and Barningham (North Yorkshire) are less likely sources of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Rotherforth was born in 1561, her father, Alexander Rotherford, was 38 and her mother, Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth, was 33. She married William Drake about 1574, in Yorkshire, England. She died in 1607, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Rotherforth est née en 1561, son père, Alexander Rotherford, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Drake environ 1574, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1607, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Hemingbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Rotherforth 1561 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Rotherford 38 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth 33. Sie hat um 1574 in Yorkshire, England William Drake geheiratet. Sie starb 1607 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Rotherforth è nata il nel 1561, sua padre, Alexander Rotherford, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Drake circa 1574, nel Yorkshire, England. Morì nel 1607, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rotherforthが1561年に生まれた時，父Alexander Rotherfordは38歳，母Mrs. Alexander Rotherforthは33歳であった。約1574年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでWilliam Drakeと結婚した。彼女は1607年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヘミングブロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rotherforth(이)가 1561년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Rotherford(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1574년 영국 요르크실르에서 William Drake(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1607년 영국 요르크실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 헤밍브루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Rotherforth nasceu em 1561, seu pai, Alexander Rotherford, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Drake aproximadamente 1574, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1607, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Rotherforth родилась в 1561 г., её отцу по имени Alexander Rotherford было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Drake около 1574 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Она умерла в 1607 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности хемингброую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Rotherforth nació en 1561, su papá, Alexander Rotherford, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mrs. Alexander Rotherforth, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Drake aproximadamente 1574, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1607, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
